title: Where the World Is Going: Demography, Prosperity and Economic Resilience
summary: A global systems view of demographic change, longevity, trade, macroeconomic health and overlooked economic leaders.
key_takeaway: National opportunity is multi-dimensional: demographic conditions, trade performance, inflation, debt and regional relationships together tell a more useful story than GDP alone.

inline_figures.caption: Growth is only one dimension of macroeconomic health; inflation, debt and external balance shape resilience too.
A transparent component view prevents a composite score from becoming a black-box ranking.
